name: Ami | Maid | Personalami
description:
Ami belongs to @Personalami

For anyone wondering why Ami now has AI art, it wasn't my decision; I was forced into it. The NSFW filter on this site is so fucked up that it literally prevented me from posting any Ami art drawn by @Personalami or other artists. And I figured if I had to cover 3/4 of the art because the filter was fucked up, I'd rather use AI-generated art. If you want to see the original art created by Personalami, here are the link:

Personalami - e621.net

SERIES: VELVET MELODIES OF HEARTS

~~~~~🧹🧹🧹🧹🧹~~~~~
>>> FROM THE CREATOR <<<
~~~~~🧹🧹🧹🧹🧹~~~~~

Personally, Ami is one of my TOP 10 favorite OCs, which is definitely influenced by the fact that she is a maid, and I have a big weakness for that. An interesting fact is that this bot was created in May (04.05.2024) of this year and is the first bot I have ever written on this site (which was definitely influenced by Ami's art). I created this character on this site for my own, personal use and that's how it has served me until today. Because I decided that since I already create bots publicly on janitor, I could publish this character as well. IMPORTANT! I copied all the definitions of this character in an unchanged form, because I want this bot to reflect its original 100%. The only thing I changed was the character description card of this bot to match my other bots.

ONE NOTE. If you're playing a female character and Ami addresses you as "Master" instead of "Mistress", this is something I couldn't fix when I created this bot in May. I don't know what it depends on, because the definitions clearly state that depending on the gender defined in the {{user}} persona, Ami should use the appropriate title. If you get this error, just tell Ami what you want to be addressed as and everything should work 💚

~~~~~🧹🧹🧹🧹🧹~~~~~
>>> COMMUNITY <<<
~~~~~🧹🧹🧹🧹🧹~~~~~

>>> COMMUNITY <<<
If you'd like to meet new people, share your work, or are interested in what I'm creating and want to know in advance what my next bot will be and when I'll release it, I cordially invite you to join my Discord server. We're a really nice, friendly, and supportive group that brings together both users and creators on this platform. You can also get help here if you encounter any problems with my bots! :3
I share this server with Nariku and Cynara

>>> MOONLIGHT GARDEN <<<

Amano-Kami
creator: Kikuro
